relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains compliance/fraud freeze actions with restrictions and escalation workflows, while the outbound file contains product holding data with balances, fees, and investment details. These serve fundamentally different purposes: one is an action/event notification, the other is a data snapshot for marketing. Only two fields (account_number and currency) have any semantic overlap, and the outbound file's structure (holdings array with product details, balances, fees) cannot reasonably be derived from a freeze action message.
